name: Element Blocker
description: Block annoying page elements — ads, cookie banners, sticky bars, popups, newsletter prompts — using CSS selectors. Add your own rules or use the built-in defaults. Click the panel button to enter picker mode and tap any element to block it permanently on that site.

configItems.name: Custom CSS selectors to block
configItems.description: One selector per line. Elements matching these will be hidden. e.g. .ad-banner, #cookie-popup, [class*=newsletter].

configItems.name: Enable built-in filter rules
configItems.description: Includes common ad, cookie banner, and popup selectors.

configItems.name: Enable element picker mode
configItems.description: When on, the panel button activates a tap-to-block picker.
